overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dimly lit covered market interior with food stalls and arcade machines, exiting into a bright sunlit urban street with palm trees and futuristic vehicles, crossing a busy intersection with steam vents, and continuing along a sidewalk beneath an overpass to a plaza area. The clip features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with neon signage and a dense cyberpunk urban aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dimly lit covered market, moving past a magazine vendor counter on the right and industrial scaffolding on the left. The camera passes a man in a white hat holding a bottle, then approaches a cooking station with steam and a prominent red banner. Arcade machines with glowing screens become visible as the camera nears the bright exit to the outside.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark interior into bright midday sunlight, causing a momentary exposure adjustment. The scene opens into a market area with wooden stalls and Japanese paper lanterns on the left, while arcade machines fade into the background on the right. The camera approaches a sunlit street with residential buildings ahead, following a pedestrian into the open urban space.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection bathed in bright sunlight with palm trees and steam vents creating atmospheric effects. The camera crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles pass by, including a prominent silver sports car. A massive concrete overpass looms on the right with neon billboards, as the camera navigates the crosswalk and turns to follow the sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a sidewalk beneath the shadow of a massive concrete overpass, passing parked futuristic cars and pedestrians. The scene transitions into a small plaza with concrete stairs leading up to a green apartment building. People are seen sitting on benches while trash bags pile along the walls, creating a gritty urban atmosphere under the highway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, enclosed market into the blinding glare of a sprawling, sun-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by navigating a dark interior past magazine counters and industrial scaffolding, moving through steam and glowing arcade machines toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges into the midday sunlight, the dark stalls and neon screens give way to wooden market stands and Japanese paper lanterns before opening onto a wide urban intersection. The scene then expands across a busy street filled with palm trees, steam vents, and futuristic silver sports cars, passing beneath a massive concrete overpass adorned with neon billboards. Finally, the camera follows the sidewalk into the shadow of the highway structure, transitioning into a gritty plaza with concrete stairs and apartment buildings.
